title: Infinity Wars: Animated Trading Card Game
description:
PIONEER OF SIMULTANEOUS TURNSBoth players plan their turns simultaneously, with every action resolving at once.

The result is a fast-paced contest of prediction, bluffing, and anticipation, without the long waits between turns found in traditional card games.

Pioneered by Infinity Wars in 2012, simultaneous turns remain a standout in game design, and more than a decade later, few games have rivalled its strategic depth.

BEAUTIFULLY ANIMATED CARDSEvery card in Infinity Wars is fully illustrated and animated, bringing each piece of art to life on the battlefield.

From characters to abilities, every card features unique animation that adds visual depth and energy to every match, redefining what a card game can be.

UNIQUE COMMANDER-BASED DECK BUILDINGForge your strategy and lead your deck with three Commanders that define your strategy and unlock powerful faction bonuses.

Combine Commanders from different factions for flexible hybrid decks, or specialize in a single faction to access its strongest cards and synergies.

With countless Commander combinations to explore, the possibilities are nearly endless.

DEATH TO PAY-TO-WINInfinity Wars believes in Death to Pay-to-Win.

Build any deck, experiment with any strategy, and compete on a truly level playing field. Every player has access to the complete competitive card library, allowing skill, not spending, to determine the outcome.

Victory comes from deckbuilding, prediction, and gameplay mastery, not collection size.

JUMP BACK INTO THE ACTION!Returning to Infinity Wars?
Your original collection is waiting, jump straight back into the fight with your original collection intact.

Request an account transfer to restore your cards, cosmetics, and currency, and continue your journey where you left off.
description_short: Outplay your opponent with simultaneous turns and commander-driven deck-building in a fully free-to-play PvP experience. Build your deck from 1000+ cards across 8 unique factions, and face opponents on a truly level playing field. In Infinity Wars, skill is the only factor that determines victory!
